title: Voice Source Index v1
description: Discovery queue for documents that could be analyzed by /voice-analyze. Tracks Glean/Confluence/GitHub/local sources with proposed audience+doc_type categorization, dedup keys, and links back to sources_seen.yaml (via source_hash) once analyzed. Lives at ~/.config/ai-seal-tools/voice/source_index.yaml (Drive-backed). Unlike sources_seen.yaml — which never stores titles or content — the index DOES store titles + URLs because it's the user-facing discovery layer and lives in their personal Drive, not in any tracked repo.

id.description: Stable per-entry id. Format: <location>_<short-hash>. Used for cross-referencing across runs.

location.description: Where the source lives. Determines how to fetch its content for analysis.

url.description: Canonical URL for non-local sources. Used as the dedup key.

path.description: Filesystem path for local sources. Used as the dedup key when no url is set.

space.description: Confluence space key, Drive folder name, GitHub repo, etc. Optional context for categorization.

updated_at.description: Last-modified timestamp from the source system, if known.

contribution_type.description: How this user is associated with the doc. 'authored' = they created it; 'contributed' = they updated/commented but did not author; 'unknown' = discovered without authorship signal. Contributed docs may or may not contain substantive prose from the user — manual review decides whether they're voice-corpus-worthy.

proposed_audience.description: Audience tag from the audience_registry. May come from heuristic or classifier; see audience_source.

audience_confidence.description: Confidence in proposed_audience. Heuristic categorizer reports its rule confidence; classifier reports its self-reported confidence; manual is always 1.0.

audience_alternates.description: Other plausible audience tags, from classifier or heuristic ambiguity.

status.description: Lifecycle: queued (in index, not fetched) → fetched (content pulled, not yet analyzed) → analyzed (propose ran) | skipped (excluded by user).

source_hash.description: SHA-256 of normalized content. Set after analysis; links to sources_seen.yaml.

proposal_id.description: ID of the most recent proposal generated for this source.
